'''Swifts''' were large, [[Color/Legends|green]], [[Reptilian/Legends|reptilian]] quadrupeds indigenous to the [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Their running speed was comparable to a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]], and they were capable of jumping great distances to traverse rough terrain. They were domesticated by [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to serve as mounts for their military [[Scout/Legends|scouts]].

{{Species-stub}}
